rules.rule: fingerprint MUST be deterministic SHA-256 over normalized text + structural feature set; NO embeddings, NO vectors
normalization is lowercase + whitespace-collapse + punctuation-strip ONLY (deterministic)
structural_kind enum: procedure-step | warning | specification | troubleshooting | app-flow | navigation | maintenance
evidence_refs must be a non-empty list; provenance preserved
presentation/CSS/typography/layout keys are forbidden in payload
